description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: In residential roof mount kits, add the cheapest rail-based kit that supports a 12-panel system, costs under $900, has at least 4 stars, and set the quantity to 1.

tasks.instruction: In commercial roof mount products, add a flat-roof ballasted system priced under $30,000 with the highest number of reviews to your cart with quantity 1.

tasks.instruction: Use the online configurator tool to design a 24-panel residential system on an asphalt shingle roof with landscape-oriented modules in at least two rows, then add all items from the generated bill of materials to the cart.

tasks.instruction: From wire management accessories, add three different items under $15 each to your cart with quantity 10 per item, ensuring at least two of them have ratings of 4.5 stars or higher.

tasks.instruction: Open a rail system product that offers both an installation manual and a Florida-related engineering document, then view the installation manual and the Florida engineering document.

tasks.instruction: Register for the earliest upcoming installer-focused webinar scheduled after June 1, 2025 that is at least 60 minutes long, using the provided contact details.

tasks.instruction: Submit a technical support request about rail misalignment on a concrete tile roof for a rail product compatible with concrete tile roofs, marking the priority as High and including an order number, project name, issue description, and full contact information.

expected_values.issue_description: Rails are not aligning with tile layout; need guidance on staggered attachment spacing and compatible tile hooks.

tasks.instruction: Using the distributor locator, find the closest stocking distributor within 100 miles of Denver, Colorado, open its detail page, and follow the link to visit its external website.

tasks.instruction: In the rail products category, compare at least two rail profiles and add 8 units of the lighter option that still has ratings of at least 140 mph wind and 30 psf snow load and costs under $40 per rail to your cart.
